message:
fix(dolt): prevent read-only mode under concurrent load (gt-lfc0d)

Three compounding failures caused Dolt to enter read-only mode with 16 polecats:
1. Branch creation (DOLT_BRANCH) had no retry logic - transient manifest lock
   errors silently fell back to all polecats writing to main branch
2. Admission control was optimistic (fail-open) - if capacity check errored,
   spawning proceeded anyway, allowing connection storms
3. No detection of "database is read only" or "cannot update manifest" as
   retryable errors

Changes:
- Add isDoltRetryableError() and doltSQLWithRetry() for exponential backoff
  on transient Dolt errors (read-only, manifest lock, optimistic lock)
- Add retry logic to CreatePolecatBranch (5 retries with backoff)
- Add retry logic to MergePolecatBranch (all 3 steps)
- Make branch creation failure fatal in polecat_spawn (no silent fallback)
- Make admission control fail-closed (HasConnectionCapacity + CheckDoltServerCapacity)
- Add "database is read only" and "cannot update manifest" to retryable errors
  in both doltserver and polecat/manager

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
